funcbody:
func (*App) copyRoute(route *Route) *Route {
	return &Route{

		use:	route.use,
		mount:	route.mount,
		star:	route.star,
		root:	route.root,

		path:		route.path,
		routeParser:	route.routeParser,

		pos:	route.pos,

		Path:		route.Path,
		Params:		route.Params,
		Name:		route.Name,
		Method:		route.Method,
		Handlers:	route.Handlers,
	}
}
